privacy.note: Raw evidence should remain in an access-controlled research workspace. This runtime skill uses only aggregate findings.

summary.dataset_scope: WeChat livestream-preview graphics from a limited source set
summary.evidence_grade: exploratory; useful for information-architecture hypotheses, not a universal aesthetic benchmark

confidence.interpretation: Treat aesthetic conclusions as hypotheses requiring human visual validation and broader samples.

known_biases: Only nine source articles were sampled.
Multi-product catalogs represent 43.59 percent of retained posters.
WeChat long-form behavior is overrepresented relative to Xiaohongshu 3:4 graphics.
Color and OCR evidence are stronger than inferred aesthetic quality.
The sample cannot establish universal rules across categories, brands, platforms, or campaign periods.
